memory.quickGuideStep1: Store long-term facts first, like your role, project background, and preferences.

skill.onboardingTitle: Getting Started: What is a Skill?
skill.onboardingDescription: A skill is a focused capability pack for AI that activates in matching tasks.
skill.onboardingStep1: Keep 3-5 high-frequency skills enabled first to reduce noise.
skill.onboardingStep2: Just send tasks as usual. AI can auto-pick relevant skills, or you can pick manually.
skill.onboardingStep3: If you need a custom workflow, click "Add Skill" and follow the guide.

welcome.title: Welcome to Cherry Agent
welcome.desc:
Your AI work companion. It can help you organize files, process data, create content, write code — like a versatile assistant right beside you.

Let's get you started in 1 minute.

workspace.title: Workspace — AI's Operating Scope
workspace.desc:
Choose a folder as your workspace. AI only reads and writes files within this directory.

💡 For example, select your Downloads folder, then say "Sort all files by type".

input.title: Tell it what you need
input.desc:
Describe your task in natural language, press Enter to send.

✨ You can also:
• Paste screenshots for AI to understand
• Be specific about what you need for better results
• Try: "Help me analyze this Excel data"

model.title: Choose AI Model
model.desc:
Three models for different needs:

• Haiku — Quick simple tasks, lowest cost
• Sonnet — Everyday work, best value
• Opus — Most powerful, slightly higher cost

Switch anytime based on task complexity.

skills.title: Skills — Professional AI Plugins
skills.desc:
Skills give AI specialized abilities. For example, install the PDF skill and AI can read and write PDF files.

📌 The 🔒 permission lock nearby controls AI autonomy:
• Full auto — AI executes directly
• Full confirm — AI asks before every step

sidebar.title: All Your Tasks
sidebar.desc:
Each conversation is an independent task. AI remembers the context, and you can return anytime to continue.

Search, pin, and archive — never lose track.

ready.title: You're all set!
ready.desc:
Try it now! Type your first task, and Cherry Agent will get right to work.

💡 Not sure what to say? Check out the recommended task cards on the welcome page.

welcome.title: What can Cherry Agent help you with?
welcome.subtitle: Select a category to quickly find related tasks, or enter your needs directly
